events.title: Cars & Coffee at The Throttlestop
events.description: Start Your Engines: Cars & Coffee at The Throttlestop Presented by Wegner Automotive Prepare for the most electric season in Throttlestop history. This year, Throttlestop is driving change with their new “Passion for Purpose” initiative, proudly partnering with The United Way of Sheboygan County to give back to the Elkhart Lake community. Throttlestop has assembled an elite lineup of sponsors to make this year better than ever and are thrilled to welcome Wegner Automotive , curators of some of the baddest racing engines on the planet, as the title sponsor. Alongside them, West Bend Dyno and Milwaukee Tool will be on-site with massive displays and some of the most exciting new builds in the country. The Details: When: Sat. June 13th, 2026 8:00 AM to 11:00 AM The Vibe: Jaw-dropping revs, breathtaking displays, and great conversation. Food: Fresh donuts from Johnston’s Bakery . Fuel: Stone Creek Coffee , provided by West Bend Dyno . Cost: Free for the whole family! Whether you are here for the precision of a Wegner-built powerhouse or the latest gear from Milwaukee Tool, you won’t want to miss this. Grab a coffee, bring the family, and talk shop. See you at the showroom!...
events.location: Throttlestop, 20 Victory Lane, Elkhart Lake, WI

events.title: Sunset Cruise at Road America
events.description: Sunset Cruise at Road America is a leisurely, low-speed, 3-lap experience of the iconic 4-mile track with your own vehicle. It is the perfect opportunity to experience one of the premier road courses in the country. This relaxing on-track opportunity is bucket list experience for locals and fans world-wide! Sunset Cruise runs on select dates May through September. Space is limited. Advance registration is required.
events.location: Road America, Elkhart Lake, WI

events.title: The Tiki Bar Live Music by 7000Apart
events.description: Spend your evening lakeside at The Tiki Bar with live music from 7000Apart.
